title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Reliance Digital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Reliance Digital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Reliance Digital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Noida-based team.

About Reliance Digital:
Reliance Digital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Reliance Digital!
